294 GG0100B_PRIOR_INDR_MBLTY_IND GG0100B_PRIOR_INDR_MBLTY_IND GG0100B Prior Functioning - Indoor Mobility Code - The data in this column identifies the patient's need for assistance in walking from room to room (with or without a device such as a cane, crutch or walker) prior to the current illness, exacerbation or injury.
